title: 上班的一天

turns.pinyin: Nǐ zhōngwǔ zài nǎlǐ chī wǔcān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zhong1wu3 zai4 na3li3 chi1 wu3can1?
turns.translation_en: Where do you eat lunch at noon?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我中午在公司附近的小吃店吃。我喜歡吃滷肉飯和燙青菜。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zhōngwǔ zài gōngsī fùjìn de xiǎochī diàn chī. Wǒ xǐhuān chī lǔròu fàn hé tàng qīngcài.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zhong1wu3 zai4 gong1si1 fu4jin4 de xiao3chi1 dian4 chi1. Wo3 xi3huan1 chi1 lu3rou4 fan4 he2 tang4 qing1cai4.
turns.translation_en: I eat at a small eatery near the company at noon. I like to eat braised pork rice and blanched greens.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 점심에 회사 근처의 작은 음식점에서 먹습니다. 루로우판과 데친 채소를 좋아합니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiàwǔ jǐ diǎn xiàbān?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xia4wu3 ji3 dian3 xia4ban1?
turns.translation_en: What time do you get off work in the afternoon?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我下午五點半下班。下班以後，我常常去公園散步。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn bàn xiàbān. Xiàbān yǐhòu, wǒ chángcháng qù gōngyuán sànbù.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xia4wu3 wu3 dian3 ban4 xia4ban1. Xia4ban1 yi3hou4, wo3 chang2chang2 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4.
turns.translation_en: I get off work at 5:30 in the afternoon. After work, I often go for a walk in the park.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 오후 5시 30분에 퇴근합니다. 퇴근 후에 저는 자주 공원에 산책하러 갑니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Nǐ wǎnshang zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 wan3shang zuo4 shen2me?
turns.translation_en: What do you do in the evening?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我晚上回家以後先洗澡，然後吃晚餐。吃完以後看電視或聽音樂。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ wǎnshang huí jiā yǐhòu xiān xǐzǎo, ránhòu chī wǎncān. Chī wán yǐhòu kàn diànshì huò tīng yīnyuè.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 wan3shang hui2 jia1 yi3hou4 xian1 xi3zao3, ran2hou4 chi1 wan3can1. Chi1 wan2 yi3hou4 kan4 dian4shi4 huo4 ting1 yin1yue4.
turns.translation_en: After I get home in the evening, I first take a shower, then eat dinner. After eating, I watch TV or listen to music.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 저녁에 집에 돌아온 후에 먼저 샤워하고, 그다음에 저녁 식사를 합니다. 식사 후에는 텔레비전을 보거나 음악을 듣습니다.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What does B often do after work?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 퇴근 후에 자주 무엇을 합니까?
options_en: Go to the park for a walk

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence, paying attention to time expressions like 中午, 下午, 晚上.
free_response_prompt: Describe your typical workday schedule from morning to evening.

title: 晚上的計畫

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān wǎnshang yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jin1tian1 wan3shang you3 kong4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Are you free this evening?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 今天晚上我有空。你想做什麼？
turns.pinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jin1tian1 wan3shang wo3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 zuo4 shen2me?
turns.translation_en: I'm free this evening. What do you want to do?
turns.translation_ko: 오늘 저녁에 시간 있습니다. 무엇을 하고 싶으십니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們一起去吃晚餐，然後看電影，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen yìqǐ qù chī wǎncān, ránhòu kàn diànyǐng, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men yi4qi3 qu4 chi1 wan3can1, ran2hou4 kan4 dian4ying3, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Shall we go eat dinner together, then watch a movie?
turns.translation_ko: 우리 함께 저녁 식사하러 가고, 그다음에 영화 보는 게 어떻습니까?

turns.speaker: B
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, méi wèntí. Nǐ xiǎng chī shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, mei2 wen4ti2. Ni3 xiang3 chi1 shen2me?
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem. What do you want to eat?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想吃牛肉麵。我知道一家很好吃的牛肉麵店。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng chī niúròu miàn. Wǒ zhīdào yì jiā hěn hǎochī de niúròu miàn diàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 chi1 niu2rou4 mian4. Wo3 zhi1dao4 yi4 jia1 hen3 hao3chi1 de niu2rou4 mian4 dian4.
turns.translation_en: I want to eat beef noodles. I know a very good beef noodle shop.
turns.translation_ko: 소고기 국수를 먹고 싶습니다. 아주 맛있는 소고기 국수 가게를 하나 알고 있습니다.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 太好了！我們晚上七點在餐廳門口見面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒmen wǎnshang qī diǎn zài cāntīng ménkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai4 hao3 le! Wo3men wan3shang qi1 dian3 zai4 can1ting1 men2kou3 jian4mian4, ke3yi3 ma?
turns.translation_en: Great! Shall we meet at the restaurant entrance at 7 p.m.?
turns.translation_ko: 정말 좋아요! 저희 저녁 7시에 식당 입구에서 만나는 것으로 괜찮습니까?

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ, wǎnshang jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3, wan3shang jian4!
turns.translation_en: Okay, see you in the evening!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What do A and B plan to do this evening?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: A와 B는 오늘 저녁에 무엇을 할 계획입니까?
options_en: Eat dinner and watch a movie

shadowing_prompt: Repeat the dialogue, focusing on making suggestions and confirming plans.
free_response_prompt: Make an evening plan with a friend using 一起, 然後, and 可以嗎.

title: 邀請喝咖啡

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你明天有空嗎？我們一起去喝咖啡，好不好？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù hē kāfēi, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ming2tian1 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 he1 ka1fei1, hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Are you free tomorrow? How about we go for coffee together?
turns.translation_ko: 내일 시간 있으세요? 같이 커피 마시러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以啊！我明天下午有空。你想去哪裡喝咖啡？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ a! Wǒ míngtiān xiàwǔ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng qù nǎlǐ hē kāfēi?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3 a5! Wo3 ming2tian1 xia4wu3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 qu4 na3li3 he1 ka1fei1?
turns.translation_en: Sure! I'm free tomorrow afternoon. Where do you want to go for coffee?
turns.translation_ko: 좋아요! 내일 오후에 시간 있어요. 어디로 커피 마시러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們去車站前面的那家咖啡店，好嗎？那裡的咖啡很好喝。
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen qù chēzhàn qiánmiàn de nà jiā kāfēi diàn, hǎo ma? Nàlǐ de kāfēi hěn hǎo hē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men qu4 che1zhan4 qian2mian4 de5 na4 jia1 ka1fei1 dian4, hao3 ma5? Na4li3 de5 ka1fei1 hen3 hao3 he1.
turns.translation_en: Let's go to that coffee shop in front of the station, okay? Their coffee is really good.
turns.translation_ko: 역 앞에 있는 그 커피숍에 갈까요? 거기 커피가 아주 맛있어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好啊！我們約下午兩點，在咖啡店門口碰面，可以嗎？
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, zài kāfēi diàn ménkǒu pèngmiàn, kěyǐ ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5! Wo3men yue1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 men2kou3 peng4mian4, ke3yi3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Great! Let's meet at 2 PM at the coffee shop entrance, okay?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒問題。明天下午兩點見！
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Míngtiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn jiàn!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Ming2tian1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 jian4!
turns.translation_en: No problem. See you tomorrow at 2 PM!

comprehension_questions.question_en: What time do they plan to meet?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on the tone of invitation and agreement.
free_response_prompt: Practice inviting a friend for coffee. Say: '你明天有空嗎？我們一起去喝咖啡，好不好？'

title: 建議時間

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我們這個週末一起去看電影，好不好？
turns.pinyin: Wǒmen zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3men zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: How about we go see a movie together this weekend?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말에 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以啊！你想看什麼電影？
turns.pinyin: Kěyǐ a! Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3yi3 a5! Ni3 xiang3 kan4 shen2me5 dian4ying3?
turns.translation_en: Sure! What movie do you want to see?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我想看那部新的中文電影。你星期六有空嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng kàn nà bù xīn de zhōngwén diànyǐng. Nǐ xīngqīliù yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xiang3 kan4 na4 bu4 xin1 de5 zhong1wen2 dian4ying3. Ni3 xing1qi1liu4 you3 kong4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I want to see that new Chinese movie. Are you free on Saturday?
turns.translation_ko: 그 새 중국 영화 보고 싶어요. 토요일에 시간 있으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 星期六上午我要上班，下午可以。我們約下午三點，在電影院門口碰面，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Xīngqīliù shàngwǔ wǒ yào shàngbān, xiàwǔ kěyǐ. Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ sān diǎn, zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu pèngmiàn, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xing1qi1liu4 shang4wu3 wo3 yao4 shang4ban1, xia4wu3 ke3yi3. Wo3men yue1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 peng4mian4, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I have to work Saturday morning, but I'm free in the afternoon. Let's meet at 3 PM at the cinema entrance, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 토요일 오전에는 출근해야 하는데 오후에는 괜찮아요. 오후 3시에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊！星期六下午三點見。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a! Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ sān diǎn jiàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5! Xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 jian4.
turns.translation_en: Great! See you Saturday at 3 PM.

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why can't they meet on Saturday morning?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 토요일 오전에 만날 수 없는 이유는 무엇입니까?
options_en: The movie is in the afternoon

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, paying attention to suggesting a time and agreeing.
free_response_prompt: Practice suggesting a time to meet. Say: '我們約下午三點，在電影院門口碰面，好嗎？'

title: 忙碌婉拒

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你明天有空嗎？我們一起去吃飯，好不好？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù chīfàn, hǎo bù hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 ming2tian1 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 chi1fan4, hao3 bu4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Are you free tomorrow? How about we go eat together?
turns.translation_ko: 내일 시간 있으세요? 같이 밥 먹으러 갈까요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不好意思，我明天很忙，沒辦法。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ míngtiān hěn máng, méi bànfǎ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4si5, wo3 ming2tian1 hen3 mang2, mei2 ban4fa3.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I'm very busy tomorrow. I can't make it.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다. 내일 너무 바빠서 어쩔 수가 없어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係。那這個週末呢？你有空嗎？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi. Nà zhège zhōumò ne? Nǐ yǒu kòng ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi5. Na4 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 ne5? Ni3 you3 kong4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: No problem. How about this weekend? Are you free?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요. 그럼 이번 주말은요? 시간 있으세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 這個週末我也沒空，因為我要去台北見朋友。我們下次再約，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Zhège zhōumò wǒ yě méi kòng, yīnwèi wǒ yào qù Táiběi jiàn péngyǒu. Wǒmen xià cì zài yuē, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 wo3 ye3 mei2 kong4, yin1wei4 wo3 yao4 qu4 Tai2bei3 jian4 peng2you3. Wo3men xia4 ci4 zai4 yue1, hao3 ma5?
turns.translation_en: I'm not free this weekend either, because I'm going to Taipei to see a friend. Let's make plans another time, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 이번 주말도 시간이 안 돼요. 타이베이에 친구 만나러 가거든요. 다음에 다시 만나요, 괜찮죠?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 好啊，沒問題。下次再聯絡！
turns.pinyin: Hǎo a, méi wèntí. Xià cì zài liánluò!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 a5, mei2 wen4ti2. Xia4 ci4 zai4 lian2luo4!
turns.translation_en: Okay, no problem. Let's get in touch next time!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Why can't B meet this weekend?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B가 이번 주말에 만날 수 없는 이유는 무엇입니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each line, focusing on polite refusal and suggesting another time.
free_response_prompt: Practice politely declining an invitation. Say: '不好意思，我明天很忙，沒辦法。我們下次再約，好嗎？'

title: 搭捷運去台北車站

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 不好意思，請問這個捷運站有到台北車站嗎？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yì si, qǐng wèn zhè ge jié yùn zhàn yǒu dào Tái běi chē zhàn ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, qing3 wen4 zhe4 ge5 jie2 yun4 zhan4 you3 dao4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, does this MRT station go to Taipei Main Station?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 지하철역이 타이베이 역까지 가나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 可以，你搭紅線，在台北車站下車。
turns.pinyin: Kě yǐ, nǐ dā hóng xiàn, zài Tái běi chē zhàn xià chē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: ke3 yi3, ni3 da1 hong2 xian4, zai4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4 xia4 che1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, you take the Red Line and get off at Taipei Main Station.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 빨간색 노선을 타시고 타이베이 역에서 내리세요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Xū yào zhuǎn chē ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: xu1 yao4 zhuan3 che1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Do I need to transfer?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不用，這是直達的。下一班車大概三分鐘到。
turns.pinyin: Bú yòng, zhè shì zhí dá de. Xià yì bān chē dà gài sān fēn zhōng dào.
turns.pinyin_numeric: bu2 yong4, zhe4 shi4 zhi2 da2 de5. xia4 yi4 ban1 che1 da4 gai4 san1 fen1 zhong1 dao4.
turns.translation_en: No, it's direct. The next train arrives in about three minutes.
turns.translation_ko: 아니요, 직통입니다. 다음 열차가 약 3분 후에 도착합니다.

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xiè xiè nǐ!
turns.pinyin_numeric: tai4 hao3 le5, xie4 xie4 ni3!
turns.translation_en: Great, thank you!

comprehension_questions.question_en: Which line should the person take?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: 그 사람은 어떤 노선을 타야 합니까?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and the polite tone of voice.
free_response_prompt: Practice asking for directions to a different MRT station, using the phrases from this dialogue.

title: 在公車站等車

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 請問，這個站牌有到學校的公車嗎？
turns.pinyin: Qǐng wèn, zhè ge zhàn pái yǒu dào xué xiào de gōng chē ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: qing3 wen4, zhe4 ge5 zhan4 pai2 you3 dao4 xue2 xiao4 de5 gong1 che1 ma5?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, does this bus stop have a bus that goes to the school?
turns.translation_ko: 실례합니다, 이 정류장에서 학교로 가는 버스가 있나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有，你可以搭二八五號公車。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu, nǐ kě yǐ dā èr bā wǔ hào gōng chē.
turns.pinyin_numeric: you3, ni3 ke3 yi3 da1 er4 ba1 wu3 hao4 gong1 che1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, you can take bus number 285.

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Xià yì bān chē yào děng jǐ fēn zhōng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: xia4 yi4 ban1 che1 yao4 deng3 ji3 fen1 zhong1?
turns.translation_en: How many minutes until the next bus?
turns.translation_ko: 다음 버스는 몇 분 후에 오나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 大概十分鐘。你要去哪裡下車？
turns.pinyin: Dà gài shí fēn zhōng. Nǐ yào qù nǎ lǐ xià chē?
turns.pinyin_numeric: da4 gai4 shi2 fen1 zhong1. ni3 yao4 qu4 na3 li3 xia4 che1?
turns.translation_en: About ten minutes. Where do you want to get off?

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 我在學校門口下車。謝謝你！
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zài xué xiào mén kǒu xià chē. Xiè xiè nǐ!

title: 問路時請對方再說一次

turns.speaker: 路人
turns.text: 不好意思，請問圖書館在哪裡？
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn túshūguǎn zài nǎlǐ?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3 yi4si, qing3 wen4 tu2shu1guan3 zai4 na3li3?
turns.translation_en: Excuse me, where is the library?

turns.speaker: 路人乙
turns.text: 從這裡直走，到第二個路口右轉，然後再走五分鐘就到了。
turns.pinyin: Cóng zhèlǐ zhí zǒu, dào dì èr ge lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, ránhòu zài zǒu wǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Cong2 zhe4li3 zhi2 zou3, dao4 di4 er4 ge lu4kou3 you4 zhuan3, ran2hou4 zai4 zou3 wu3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le.
turns.translation_en: Go straight from here, turn right at the second intersection, then walk for five minutes and you'll be there.
turns.translation_ko: 여기서 직진하시고, 두 번째 교차로에서 오른쪽으로 도신 후, 5분만 걸으시면 도착합니다.

turns.speaker: 路人
turns.text: 抱歉，可以請你說慢一點嗎？我聽不太清楚。
turns.pinyin: Bàoqiàn, kěyǐ qǐng nǐ shuō màn yīdiǎn ma? Wǒ tīng bù tài qīngchǔ.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bao4qian4, ke3yi3 qing3 ni3 shuo1 man4 yi1dian3 ma? Wo3 ting1 bu4 tai4 qing1chu3.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, could you please speak a little slower? I can't hear clearly.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 조금 천천히 말씀해 주시겠어요? 잘 안 들려요.

turns.speaker: 路人乙
turns.text: 沒問題。先直走，到第二個路口右轉，再走五分鐘，圖書館就在你的左邊。
turns.pinyin: Méi wèntí. Xiān zhí zǒu, dào dì èr ge lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, zài zǒu wǔ fēnzhōng, túshūguǎn jiù zài nǐ de zuǒ biān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 wen4ti2. Xian1 zhi2 zou3, dao4 di4 er4 ge lu4kou3 you4 zhuan3, zai4 zou3 wu3 fen1zhong1, tu2shu1guan3 jiu4 zai4 ni3 de zuo3 bian1.
turns.translation_en: No problem. First go straight, turn right at the second intersection, then walk five minutes, the library will be on your left.

turns.speaker: 路人
turns.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ dǒng le. Xièxie nǐ!
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3 de, wo3 dong3 le. Xie4xie ni3!
